action_text: Select the checkbox for EXP-15319670314 (duplicate without a task association)
rationale: We need to delete duplicates not associated with tasks. The second row is a duplicate ("Ten experience whole note...") with Source ID "User: Ana Christensen" (not a task). Selecting it is the first step toward bulk deletion.

action_text: Select the checkbox for EXP-25319670314 (duplicate without a task association)
rationale: The third row is another duplicate with the same short description and Source ID "User: Ana Christensen". Selecting it prepares it for deletion.

action_text: Select the checkbox for EXP-35319670314 (duplicate without a task association)
rationale: The fourth row is also a duplicate with the same short description and is not associated with a task. Selecting it will include it in the deletion set.

action_text: Choose "Delete" from the "Actions on selected rows" menu
rationale: After selecting the non-task duplicates, we should delete them. Using the list action is the standard way to remove selected records.

action_text: Toggle "Show column search row" to display per-column filters
rationale: If we want to further refine selection (e.g., filter Source ID to "User:"), showing the per-column search row will help identify and isolate non-task duplicates quickly.
